founder.description: Allocation to founder for project creation, vision, and ongoing leadership

operations.description: Allocation to operational expenses with room for growth as the platform scales

civic.description: Allocation to civic initiatives, public good projects, and community engagement. This represents the majority of revenue (10% base + 60% remainder) dedicated to civic mission and public good.
initiatives: Open data advocacy and access programs

research_and_development.description: Allocation to R&D for cryptographic improvements and protocol enhancements

notes: This revenue distribution model prioritizes civic responsibility and public good (70% to civic fund), while maintaining minimal founder compensation (10%), operational sustainability (10%), and continuous innovation (10% R&D). The civic-first allocation ensures Olympus serves the public interest above all else. All percentages are subject to review based on business needs and market conditions.
